title: callianthe peruviana
intro: Callianthe peruviana, also known as Cat's Claw, is a woody vine native to the Amazon rainforest. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Callianthe peruviana include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potentially reducing the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Callianthe peruviana include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the bark or root of the plant in hot water or a solvent.
